baseline.worktree_note: The worktree was dirty only with this assessment-document overlay. All non-doc paths matched the commit during final evidence execution. Two concurrent documentation-only commits moved HEAD from 36146eac to 422415009 without changing src, tests, pyproject.toml, or uv.lock.

environment.dotenv: present, but pytest-dotenv was explicitly disabled for EV-001 through EV-003; values not loaded or captured
environment.database_profile: SQLite via the repository test fixtures

structure_snapshot.limitation: The index commit predates the assessed commit by two documentation-only commits. index_diff_get reported no dirty indexed files and no modified indexed files, and Git proved no non-doc diff, so structural source claims are disjoint from the commit drift. Unresolved/external sites and historical missing-file tombstones still prevent an unreachability claim from index absence alone.

tracker_snapshot.limitation: Tracker state is a non-atomic mutable snapshot and is ownership evidence, never behavioral proof.

evidence.warning_note: Disabling pytest-dotenv leaves the configured env_files option unknown; pytest emits one PytestConfigWarning. No .env values are loaded.
evidence.establishes: Narrow SQLite repository and executable source-contract evidence for strict authority, stale-token zero-mutation refusal, legacy-adapter isolation, and pending-sink bundle admission/refusal.
evidence.does_not_establish: Production orchestration, independent-process contention, expiry/reclaim, every subtype, plugin composition, or crash/restart convergence.

evidence.warning_note: Disabling pytest-dotenv leaves the configured env_files option unknown; pytest emits one PytestConfigWarning. No .env values are loaded.
evidence.establishes: Direct barrier snapshot/refusal/rollback evidence and built-in local sink response-loss, diversion, member-classification, and virtual-effect pipeline evidence.
evidence.does_not_establish: Abrupt process death, external sinks, long effect calls, generation takeover, every sink seam, aggregation continuation, or complete plugin lifecycle behavior.

evidence.warning_note: Disabling pytest-dotenv leaves the configured env_files option unknown; pytest emits one PytestConfigWarning. No .env values are loaded.
evidence.establishes: Direct SQLite repository evidence for exact TS-07 through TS-10 success images, subtype/owner/membership/bundle refusals, and event/branch-loss rollback.
evidence.does_not_establish: Production plugin/follower composition, contention, crash/restart, every database profile, lifecycle, or read-model truth tables.

legs.reason: Leadership takeover is named by authority and double-winner gates and lacks a complete fresh-process matrix.

legs.reason: Worker/leader heartbeat and stale-epoch coupling lack the complete coordination proof package.

legs.reason: Source inspection found that a losing seat CAS can still depart membership and that the membership update is not run-scoped.
legs.exit_gate: Exact run/leader/epoch release atomically clears the seat and departs that membership; stale, foreign, and CAS-losing releases leave both planes unchanged.

legs.reason: Follower admission is named by double-winner/lifecycle gates and lacks real concurrent join proof.
legs.exit_gate: Live/expired/missing leader and duplicate/concurrent follower admission arms pass through the real join boundary.

legs.reason: Worker departure is named by coordination atomicity/lifecycle gates and lacks complete teardown/restart proof.
legs.exit_gate: Active departure, repeat/stale refusal, heartbeat-after-departure, exceptional teardown, and restart arms pass.

legs.reason: The repository eviction predicate does not independently exclude leader-role or current-leader targets and relies on caller preselection.
legs.exit_gate: Repository and production caller both enforce one eligible grace-expired non-leader; live, leader, foreign-run, and stale-authority arms are inert in independent processes.

legs.reason: Source composition/exclusion and source-COMPLETED crash behavior remain open.

legs.reason: Barrier-backed BLOCKED counting drives completion and resume preflight without a complete truth table.

legs.reason: Source failure/quarantine scheduler exclusion is not complete production evidence.
legs.exit_gate: Every pre-row failure and exclusion path records audit evidence and creates no scheduler row.

legs.reason: Deleted WAITING state lacks one maintained reachability/refusal regression package.
legs.exit_gate: Vocabulary, schema, writers, readers, restore paths, and production config prove absence and refusal.

legs.reason: Dormant queue-only hold reachability and release authority remain unproved.
legs.exit_gate: Decision, reachability scan with limitations, and maintained production refusal/recovery evidence establish deliberate absence.

hard_gates.reason: Pending-sink malformed bundles are covered narrowly; admission and recovery of every durable subtype are not.
Strict helper/source-contract evidence is strong, but every live leader-seat and production write path is not covered.
The required independent-process queue, coordination, and effect contention matrices are incomplete.
Selected refusal images pass; the named repository-wide durable-plane cases do not.
Barrier and disposition atomicity are covered narrowly; source continuation is open, heartbeat intentionally has no event, and RC-04 can mutate membership after a losing seat CAS.
Built-in response-loss recovery is in-process and the named fresh-process seams remain unproved.
All scheduler, coordination, resume, redrive, and barrier-intake read models lack complete production truth-table evidence; queue-only hold reachability is unresolved.
Fresh, resume, follower, partial-start, plugin boundary, and teardown coverage is incomplete.
All 68 legs contain at least one unknown or partial mandatory cell; this is a global gate and does not by itself convert every leg from unknown to gap.
RC-04 and RC-07 repository predicates are weaker than their required fail-closed contracts; the architecture and assessment now expose rather than conceal that source/contract mismatch.

derived.reason: Every leg has at least one unresolved mandatory cell and every hard gate remains open.

limitations: Evidence was deliberately conservative: prior passing runs and closed issues were not promoted without fresh exact attachment.
The focused runs use the repository SQLite test profile and do not establish every advertised database/deployment profile.
Injected response loss and exception rollback are not abrupt operating-system process death.
Loomweave was fresh at the commit but reports unresolved and external call/reference sites, so absence is not an unreachability proof.
The tracker snapshot is mutable ownership context and was not used as behavioral evidence.
